subject: Unit 11: sf_sinh.s + sf_cosh.s + sf_tanh.s — 6-mv adapter chains
description: All three call __gf_fpexexp with 6-mv shuffle before/after. Eliminate by rearranging upstream. sf_sinh.s also has __clzsi2 double-frame. Test with: make test-sinhf, make test-coshf, make test-tanhf
activeForm: Optimizing sf_sinh/cosh/tanh.s adapter chains and frame
